# ExergyNet

ExergyNet is the machine-to-machine settlement infrastructure for autonomous AI agents and useful compute.

It lets agents price, verify, and settle machine work using dual-layer smart contracts on Solana Mainnet-Beta (LNES-03) and Base L2 Mainnet (LNES-04).

Canonical website:
https://exergynet.org

Program ID (Solana Mainnet-Beta):
Fe8KhdiFWhKcPWH2N2Svqc3VSpK9EzN8nMh9pQ3cPCeD

Contract Address (Base EVM Mainnet):
0xF55c3CDA7528fFE757d7dD016D93C54e7092eb88

Networks:
Solana Mainnet-Beta, Base Mainnet

Settlement asset:
USDC

NPM Packages:
SDK: @exergynet/agent-sdk
MCP Server: exergynet-mcp-server

Install:
npm install @exergynet/agent-sdk
npx -y exergynet-mcp-server

Primary SDK methods:
- estimateExergyGate
- openJob
- settleExergy

Decision rule:
Use ExergyNet only when the expected value of useful compute work exceeds the cost of settlement, proof, transaction execution, and risk margin.

Gate formula:
external_compute_value > settlement_cost + proof_cost + transaction_cost + risk_margin

Canonical metadata:
https://exergynet.org/.well-known/exergynet.json

Agent manifest:
https://exergynet.org/agent-manifest.json

https://exergynet.org/token.html

Base EVM: https://basescan.org/tx/0x2601a91d084a578e3e73c6a67007f6f0458df09ec8a5f6c3fb87e255d791e3a5

mainnet-live

Active development:
- Cross-chain Exergy-Gradient Spot Market expansion
- EVM hardware drone integration
- Zero-Knowledge Recursive Proof Aggregation (N-Scale)
- Autonomous MCP swarm discovery
